stemHtml: An aircraft is descending from FL290 at a constant Mach number close to M<sub>MO</sub>. What must the flight crew do to avoid accidentally exceeding V<sub>MO</sub>?

options.a: At the changeover altitude the flight crew must stop flying at a Mach number and fly at an increased IAS.
options.b: At the transition level the flight crew must stop flying at a Mach number and fly at a constant IAS.
options.c: At the transition level the flight crew must stop flying at a Mach number and fly at an increased IAS.
options.d: At the changeover altitude the flight crew must stop flying at a Mach number and fly at a constant IAS.
